title: Arcanum Machina
description: An ancient world full of magic awaiting your ingenious creations.
body:
Embark on a journey through an altered world where you the player can blend magic and machinery  to intertwine in harmony! **Arcanum Machina** is a modpack designed for players who love the thrill of physical magic, immersive magical fantasy landscapes, and the ingenuity of engineering.

_(I do **not** own any of the mods inside this modpack, you can visit their respective owners via the pages of each individual mod. This is mostly for a small community, but I am open to share this with the public and I will take feedback and will try to take action on any bugs or errors that occur due to mine own formatting and mod choices.)_
